title: crassocephalum sonchifolium
intro: Crassocephalum sonchifolium, also known as Ntongolo or Red Leaf, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, belonging to the family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. The health benefits of Crassocephalum sonchifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
